on

The Nigeria 4x100m relay teams have been handed tough draws in the men and women’s categories.

The men’s team will be up against USA, Great Britain, and Japan.

The duo of Kanyinsola Ajayi and Favour Ashe will spearhead Nigeria’s charge for medal in the event.

The women’s team will clash with Great Britain, France and Jamaica.

Favour Ofili will be hoping to win a medal in the event after the disappointment of her outing in the women’s 200m final.

The semi-finals is slated for Stade de France on Friday.
